title: uragoga mesomorpha
side_effects: Uragoga mesomorpha can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, high blood pressure, and respiratory problems due to its stimulatory properties. Ingestion of large amounts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even seizures in severe cases. Additionally, improper use can interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and cardiovascular disease.
